title: Crew project profile
description: Per-project context for the crew plugin. Written once by `/crew:init`, committed at .crew/profile.json, and read by the assemble skill and its agents so the same flow runs in any repo.

trunk.description: The integration branch efforts merge into (e.g. main, dev).

gates.description: Commands the builder/inspector run to verify work. Empty string = not available in this repo.

protected.description: Glob patterns the builder must never stage/commit (secrets, generated, machine-local).

codegen.description: Whether and how the repo regenerates code from a schema (e.g. GraphQL).

prerequisite.description: Anything that must be true first (e.g. 'backend running').

visualQA.description: How the inspector visually checks UI work. `target`/`startCommand` are project facts, always set here. `tool` is normally omitted — it resolves at runtime from your ~/.claude/crew/preferences.json (default `playwright`; visual QA only actually runs when a `target` is set); set it here only to PIN a tool for the whole project.

conventions.description: House rules the crew must follow, and/or a pointer to the repo doc that states them.

docRef.description: Path to an in-repo conventions doc the agents should read (e.g. AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md).

models.description: Optional per-project PIN of model tiers. Normally OMITTED — models resolve at dispatch from your ~/.claude/crew/preferences.json, else the plugin default. Set here only to pin a tier for the whole project (e.g. force a strong builder regardless of who runs it). 'inherit' uses the session model; scout and operative default cheaper (bounded/scoped work), while surveyor, inspector, and the rest stay strong.

personas.description: Optional per-project PIN of display names (narration only; invocation handles stay functional). Normally OMITTED — personas resolve at dispatch from your ~/.claude/crew/preferences.json, else the plugin default. Set here only when init offers to pin a skin so the whole team narrates the same names.

architectureMap.description: The persisted project-understanding map and the commit it was generated at (for staleness checks).

runbook.description: Crew-authored operational ground truth for this project — how it runs, verifies, and behaves — and the commit it was last curated at (for staleness checks). The crew consults it and curates it over time; `init` scaffolds it empty. Optional; a profile without it stays valid.

board.description: The foreman's live orchestration state, kept outside volatile context so it survives a compaction. Rewritten as work progresses, so it carries no staleness sha. Optional; a profile without it stays valid.
